stemHtml:
Given the following information, what is the distance from the end of the TODR to 1500 ft above reference zero for the purpose of obstacle clearance for a performance class B aeroplane?

Cloud base: 300 ft above reference zero
Tas: 101 kt
No wind
All engines rate of climb at take off power: 1830 ft/min
Single engine rate of climb at take off power: 400 ft /min
